Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Alumni Stories Home Alumni Stories Alumni Stories DAKSHDEEP SINGH  Success Story From a fresh computer science graduate to a leader in Read More X DAKSHDEEP SINGH  Success Story From a fresh computer science graduate to a leader in HR technology , my journey has been
one of continuous growth and transformation. Starting as a Recruitment
Executive at HCL Tech , I discovered my passion for the intersection of HR and technology . Through
dedication and hard work, I climbed the ranks, taking on increasingly
challenging roles. At PeopleStrong , I found the perfect platform to
blend my technical expertise with my HR passion, rising from Solution
Architect to Senior Vice President
of Product
Management & Digital Transformation . I'm
deeply grateful to the mentors, colleagues, and teachers who have shaped my
path. To my early managers at HCL,
who believed in me; the visionary leaders at PeopleStrong, who entrusted me
with crucial responsibilities; and my professors at the School of Inspired
Leadership and ISB Online – your guidance has been invaluable. To
my office friends who've shared late nights and triumphs – your support has
made this journey not just successful but enjoyable. As
I stand recognized as a Laureate in HR by The Laureate Assembly , I'm humbled and inspired to
continue innovating in HR technology . This
journey has taught me that success is a collective effort, and I'm excited to
pay it forward as I continue to grow and lead in this ever-evolving field. About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
